nav.announcement: We just launched our new website.

home.title: Crafted from the core out
home.subtitle: Where user needs align with business goals. We find it — everything else radiates from there.
home.horizonSubtext: Together, we move towards that point on the horizon.
home.intro1: What do your users actually need? What does your business need to achieve?
home.intro2: We sit with those questions until the answers are clear.
home.intro4: From there, we get to work.
home.intro6: Through listening, observing, validating, and measuring. Closely with you, until it works.
home.intro7: Because launching is easy. Getting it right is hard.
home.featuredWorkTagline: Every project starts with clear goals and ends with proof — not just that it shipped, but that it worked.
home.aboutText: Radial is a small, Rotterdam-based design studio. We work as an extension of your team — no layers, no hand-offs, just direct collaboration with the people doing the work.
home.aboutApproach1Text: With a compact team, every client gets senior-level attention. No juniors learning on your project — you work directly with the people who design and build.
home.aboutApproach2Text: Our clients visit regularly and we visit them. We believe the best products emerge when designers and stakeholders work side by side.
home.aboutApproach3Text: We start every project with deep user research, then move fast using AI-powered workflows — without sacrificing craft or quality.
home.aboutApproach4Text: From discovery to production-ready code — we handle the full trajectory. No separate dev agency needed, no lost-in-translation moments.
home.whyRadialText: Freelancers disappear after the mockup. Seconded staff clock in, clock out. Big agencies send juniors and invoices. There's a better way to build.
home.whyCol2Pro3: Research, design & code — end to end
home.whyRadialStoryText: We stay small on purpose. No social media, no content marketing, no sales team. Every hour we don't spend on self-promotion is an hour we spend on your product. We believe great work speaks for itself — and that's the only marketing we need.
home.whyRadialAIText: AI helps us achieve more with a small team — faster research, rapid prototyping, accelerated development. But we're deliberate about where we use it and where we don't. Strategy, user understanding, and creative direction deserve human depth. We use AI to amplify our craft, not replace it.
home.aiText: AI doesn't just make us faster — it lets us go further than ever. We build working prototypes and production-ready products in a single pass. We skip steps that used to take weeks. While most studios are still figuring out where AI fits, we've made it central to how we work — deliberately, and only where it makes our output better.
home.aiText2: But we're clear about where AI belongs and where it doesn't. Strategy, user understanding, and creative direction stay human. AI amplifies our craft. It doesn't replace it.
home.aiPoint1Text: AI ingests, catalogs, and surfaces patterns. We set the questions.
home.aiPoint2Text: AI generates options. We evaluate and evolve.
home.aiPoint3Text: Working prototypes and production code — built in a fraction of the time, without cutting corners.
home.aiPoint4Text: Problem definition. Success metrics. Creative direction. This stays human.
home.ctaText: Let's talk about your next project. We'd love to hear what you're working on.

about.title: About Radial
about.subtitle: We're a small, focused studio that believes great design starts with understanding people.
about.storyIntro: We started Radial because we were frustrated. Frustrated by agencies that talk more than they build. By freelancers who disappear after the mockup. By teams where the people who pitch are never the people who do the work.
about.storyText: Radial was born in Rotterdam in 2019 — out of a shared conviction that building great digital products doesn't require big teams or bloated processes. It requires focus, craft, and genuine collaboration. Our founders came from the agency world, the startup world, and the enterprise world. They'd seen what works and — more importantly — what doesn't.
about.storyGrowth: Since then, we've grown deliberately. We stay small on purpose. Every client works directly with senior people who design, build, and ship. No hand-offs to juniors, no surprise invoices, no layers between you and the work.
about.storyPhilosophy: We believe our work sells itself. Instead of investing in visibility, we invest in the work — for clients like Heineken, Uber, and SPIE. Great results for great clients attract great new clients. That's the only growth strategy we need.
about.storyToday: Today, we work with startups validating their first product, scale-ups refining their experience, and enterprises that need to move faster than their internal teams allow. Whether it's a four-day design sprint or a six-month product build — we bring the same level of care.
about.vision1Text: Not with features, not with technology, not with business cases. With real people and their real problems. Everything else follows.
about.vision2Text: The best work happens when a small group of talented people is deeply invested in the outcome. We don't scale with headcount — we scale with focus.
about.vision3Title: AI is a tool, not a shortcut
about.vision3Text: We use AI to amplify our process — synthesizing research faster, exploring more directions, iterating at speed. But the thinking, the taste, the judgment? That's still human.
about.vision4Text: We don't throw designs over a wall. We design and build in tandem, because the best interface decisions happen when you can feel the product in your hands.
about.vision5Text: Too many teams ship beautiful products without ever knowing if they worked. We start every project with clear goals and measure against them. Conversion rates, task completion, user satisfaction — we track what matters. Not because clients ask for it, but because we believe good design should prove itself.
about.approachIntro: We've developed a process that's structured enough to be reliable, but flexible enough to fit your context. Here's the gist.
about.approachResearchText: Every project starts with understanding. We talk to users, analyze data, and map out the problem space before touching a single pixel. This phase is where we earn the right to design.
about.approachDesignText: We move from low-fidelity explorations to polished interfaces — fast. Every decision has a reason. We don't design for the portfolio, we design for the user.
about.approachBuildText: We don't hand off Figma files and wish you luck. We build production-ready front-ends, integrate with your stack, and iterate in code — because that's where the product lives.
about.approachAIText: We use AI throughout our process — from research synthesis to generating UI variations to writing documentation. It lets us deliver more, faster, without cutting corners.
about.approachIterateText: We test with real users, measure what matters, and refine continuously. The goal isn't perfection — it's learning fast and shipping with confidence.
about.teamIntro: We're a small crew that punches above its weight. Everyone at Radial is senior, hands-on, and genuinely invested in the work.
about.teamBartBio: Bart has over 10 years of experience in digital product design. He's worked with everything from early-stage startups to enterprise organizations, and founded Radial to build the kind of studio he always wanted to work at — one where craft and collaboration come first.
about.teamJasperBio: Jasper brings a sharp eye for detail and a deep understanding of design systems. He turns complex problems into elegant, scalable interfaces — and has an uncanny ability to make things feel 'just right'.
about.teamErwinBio: Erwin bridges the gap between design and engineering. He builds performant, pixel-perfect front-ends that bring our designs to life — and isn't afraid to push back when a design needs to be more buildable.
about.ctaText: We'd love to hear about your project. Whether you have a clear brief or just an idea — let's explore what's possible.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Pick the package that fits your needs.
pricing.faq1Q: How does the design process work?
pricing.faq1A: We start with a kickoff to understand your goals, users, and constraints. From there we move into research, wireframing, visual design, and prototyping — always with regular check-ins so you stay in the loop.
pricing.faq2Q: How long does a typical project take?
pricing.faq2A: Most projects take between 4 and 12 weeks, depending on the scope. A design sprint delivers results in just four days. We'll give you a clear timeline before we start.
pricing.faq3Q: Do you also build the product?
pricing.faq3A: We focus on design and prototyping, but we work closely with development teams to ensure a smooth handoff. We can also recommend trusted development partners if needed.
pricing.faq4Q: What if I need changes after the project?
pricing.faq4A: We offer flexible support packages for ongoing iterations. Many clients continue with a monthly retainer for continuous improvements and new features.
pricing.faq5Q: Can I book a single day?
pricing.faq5A: Absolutely. Our day-rate packages are designed to be flexible. You can book a single day for a workshop, audit, or quick design task.
pricing.faq6A: We primarily work in Figma for design, FigJam for workshops, and Notion for documentation. Prototypes are built in Figma or code, depending on the project needs.
